metadata.description: SideQuest - ADHD-friendly Claude Code plugins for developers who thrive on hyperfocus. Tools that work with your brain, not against it.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Core productivity commands, specialized agents, and custom skills for dotfiles management, shell workflows, HyperFlow keyboard orchestration, and SuperWhisper voice dictation.

plugins.name: atuin
plugins.description: Atuin shell history integration - search, capture, and manage bash command history with AI. Never lose a command again.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git intelligence for Claude Code - session context, commit history, smart commits with Conventional Commits. Includes MCP server, SessionStart/PreCompact hooks, and slash commands.

plugins.name: bun-runner
plugins.description: Smart test runner and linter MCP server. Run tests and lint with structured, token-efficient output. Filters out passing tests and verbose logs, focusing agents on failures.
